{{Quote|Cheenee Rift has more holes in it than a chunk of Byss cheese. The Czerka mining complex sits over a network of caverns.|[[Risha Drayen]]|<ref name="TOR:Bait" />}}
The '''Cheenee Rift''' was a valley located within the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]], on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was the location of a [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Abandoned Czerka Mining Complex|complex]] that was abandoned by the time of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].<ref name="TOR:Bait" />
